wine_hotels.name: Andrássy Kúria and Spa
wine_hotels.description: The only five-star hotel in Borsod-Abaúj-Zemplén County, in a historic Andrássy mansion restored in 2008. Hungary's first vinotherapy wellness centre using grape and grape-seed extracts; Gault and Millau two-hat Talu Restaurant; Bobajka restaurant with a 120-wine all-Tokaj list.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Bobajka wine bar with 120 Tokaj wines; Michelin Sommelier Award-winning pairing service; VinoSense Spa with vinotherapy treatments

wine_hotels.name: Gróf Degenfeld Kastélyszálló Superior
wine_hotels.category: 4-star superior castle hotel with on-site winery
wine_hotels.description: Former manor house at the centre of a 35 ha vineyard estate in Tarcal. Estate winemaker produces Furmint, Hárslevelű, Yellow Muscat, and Aszú wines; cellar visits and tastings of 5, 7, or 8 wines; romantic castle setting.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Furmint, Hárslevelű, and Aszú tastings; cellar visits with the estate winemaker; vineyard walks

wine_hotels.name: Minaro Hotel Tokaj MGallery
wine_hotels.description: Accor MGallery property among the UNESCO-listed vineyards of Tokaj, with Mayan-inspired architecture and panoramic views. Tortuga Restaurant, Viracocha Bar, 12-week Saturday Wine Tales tasting series, and spa with adventure pools. Wine and gastronomy masterclasses available.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Weekly Wine Tales Saturday tasting series with Tokaj producers (Béres, Oremus, Sauska); regional bus wine tours; complimentary wine education

wine_hotels.name: Mercure Tokaj Center
wine_hotels.description: Accor Mercure hotel on the main street of Tokaj, between the Tisza and Bodrog rivers. Winestone restaurant with 120 Tokaj wines; balconied rooms with river or hillside views; summer wine terrace; indoor and outdoor pools.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Winestone restaurant with 120 local wines; seasonal wine terrace on Bodrog riverfront; proximity to Rákóczi cellars and wine museum

wine_hotels.name: Barta Pince Rákóczi-Aspremont Mansion Suites
wine_hotels.category: Boutique wine estate suites in a 17th-century mansion
wine_hotels.description: Three luxurious period-furnished suites in the first floor of the 17th-century Rákóczi-Aspremont Mansion in Mád, operated by Barta Winery. Immersive Mád wine village location adjacent to the winery; estate wine programme and village cellar access.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Direct access to Barta Winery organic Furmint range; Mád village cellar walk; estate tasting by arrangement

wine_hotels.name: Barta Pince Vendégház
wine_hotels.category: Traditional rural guesthouse adjacent to winery
wine_hotels.description: Renovated three-room peasant house with veranda in Mád, run by Barta Winery. Accommodates up to 6 guests with option for extra beds; authentic rural setting adjacent to the winery; Mád village walking distance to Holdvölgy, Szepsy, among others.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Barta estate wines available; proximity to Mád's top wineries for self-guided cellar visits

wine_hotels.name: Füleky Pincészet Guesthouse
wine_hotels.category: Wine estate guesthouse in 18th-century Baroque mansion
wine_hotels.description: Six ensuite double bedrooms in the 18th-century Baroque Füleky mansion in Bodrogkeresztúr, next to the Gothic church and modern winery. Cellar visits, dinner menus, and wine events available; estate owns 25 ha in top Tokaj vineyards.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Füleky estate wines from 25 ha; cellar visits; pairing dinner menus

wine_hotels.name: Hotel Botrytis
wine_hotels.description: Small boutique hotel associated with Mad Wine in Mád, with four double rooms, two single rooms, and one apartment set among the vineyards. Immersive wine village base for exploring the Mád premier cru appellations.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Mad Wine estate wines from 20 ha of volcanic-soil vineyards; cellar visits; vineyard walks

wine_hotels.name: Sauska Tokaj Guest Accommodation
wine_hotels.description: Accommodation at the Sauska Tokaj winery complex completed 2024, combining a vat room, Padi restaurant (Michelin Opening of the Year 2025), wine store and bar. Contemporary design on the hillside with panoramic views.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Sauska sparkling and still Tokaji wines; Padi restaurant tasting menus themed on Tokaj; winery visits

wine_hotels.name: Béres Vineyards Guest Accommodation
wine_hotels.description: Accommodation at Béres Vineyards and Winery in Erdőbénye, designed by architect Anthony Gall. Outdoor event space and circular-skylight courtyard; estate-visit programmes including late-harvest and Aszú tastings.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Béres estate wines from Erdőbénye volcanic soils; cellar visits; wine tastings and diverse events

wine_hotels.name: Tokajicum Borház Guest Accommodation
wine_hotels.description: Guesthouse at the Tokajicum Borház Mediterranean-style wine house in Tarcal, built 2002. Vineyards on the Tarcal-Mád border; near Andrássy Kúria and Gróf Degenfeld; estate tastings include mineral Furmint and late-harvest dessert wines.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Tokajicum estate wines; single-vineyard Furmint and Hárslevelű; late-harvest selections

wine_hotels.name: Karádi-Berger Borászat Guest Accommodation
wine_hotels.description: Winery guesthouse in Erdőbénye offering one-week immersive Tokaj wine programmes. Guests live in the wine village, visit neighbouring estates, and participate in guided tastings across the Tokaj-Hegyalja; tailored wine-week itineraries.
wine_hotels.wine_program: One-week Tokaj wine immersion programme; visits to regional estates; guided tastings of Aszú and dry Furmint
